title: Dungeons & Dimensions
description: This mod features many different kinds of dimensions, structures, ore, armor, weapons, and more. Fight different kinds of bosses and mobs!
body:
Dungeons & Dimensions expands the world of Minecraft. Explore all 5 dimensions and obtain the most powerful weapons every known in history! Find the many bosses and mobs that wonder in unknown parts of the Minecraft universe.

The Dimensions:
There are 5 new dimensions that are featured in this mod. The Frostlight Dimension, The Realm of Volcano, The Void Realm, The Giants Dimension, and The Cloud Dimension. Every one of these dimensions have an igniter to get to these dimensions and all of them have their own unique mobs. 

The Structures:
Structures can be found in every dimension. From the Overworld to even the Void. 
Almost all structures found have loot in them.

The Bosses:
There are plenty of bosses that are also in this mod. All of which are in different dimensions. 

Full description and images on the mod here:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1VHMAC-IOrssnpNCkRtBShVqmQCSoknokCZSmijVEq3Y/edit
